visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, dark, slightly messy hair is shown in a medium close-up, selfie-style shot. She is wearing a black thin-strap top that reveals her shoulders and upper chest. She is positioned in an indoor setting with warm, soft lighting, likely a hotel room or bedroom, with a neutral-colored curtain or headboard in the background. She looks directly into the lens with a slightly furrowed brow and an expressive, talking facial movement. (2) As she continues to speak, she reaches up with her right hand to adjust and toss her hair back. Her expression shifts between a mock-serious look and a slight pout. The camera is slightly shaky, indicating it is handheld. (3) She finishes her sentence with a dramatic rolling of her eyes and a slight head tilt to the side, maintaining the same indoor background. Her hand drops back down out of the frame as she continues her expressive monologue.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 那天整天問我有沒有. (2) [Subtitle]: 男朋友的人很煩餒. (3) [Subtitle]: 我就時有時無啊. (4) [Subtitle]: 跟你說沒有. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後下次你又問. (6) [Subtitle]: 我就說有. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後你就說我騙你. (8) [Subtitle]: 喔超煩的.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking rapidly in Mandarin with a high-pitched, expressive, and slightly complaining tone. The vocal delivery is clear and direct, with significant pitch modulation. (2) The voice continues with a sharp rise in pitch as she emphasizes a point about people asking her questions. A very slight rustle of fabric and a faint handling noise are audible as she moves her hand. (3) The recording ends with a final, slightly lower-pitched exclamation, maintaining the conversational and energetic pace throughout the 11 seconds.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous social media monologue where the creator jokingly complains about people constantly asking about her relationship status, concluding that her answers change frequently which confuses and 'annoys' others. It aims to build engagement through relatability and personality.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical portrait-style short video likely intended for platforms like TikTok or Douyin, characterized by its selfie perspective and relatable social commentary.
